mapper.select: SELECT id, live_id, offer_sdp, answer_sdp, sender_candidates, receiver_candidates, created_at, updated_at FROM webrtc_signal WHERE live_id = #{liveId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO webrtc_signal (live_id, offer_sdp, sender_candidates) VALUES (#{liveId}, #{offerSdp}, #{senderCandidates})
mapper.update: UPDATE webrtc_signal SET offer_sdp = #{offerSdp}, sender_candidates = #{senderCandidates}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE live_id = #{liveId}
UPDATE webrtc_signal SET answer_sdp = #{answerSdp}, receiver_candidates = #{receiverCandidates}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE live_id = #{liveId}
UPDATE webrtc_signal SET sender_candidates = #{senderCandidates}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE live_id = #{liveId}
UPDATE webrtc_signal SET receiver_candidates = #{receiverCandidates}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE live_id = #{liveId}
